programme.title: Day 1 - Two Phases – 1.40m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. The event brings together leading international riders competing in top-level Jumping and Dressage, including Olympic and world champions, highlighting precision, technique, and excellence on one of the sport’s most prestigious stages.

programme.title: Andrey Rublev vs Arthur Fils - Singles Final - Day 7 - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. Featuring a 32-player singles draw, it offers around €2.8m in prize money, with top-ranked players competing for 500 ranking points ahead of the major clay-court tournaments.

programme.title: Levante vs Sevilla - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Levante UD have won just one of their last nine LaLiga matches against Sevilla, a 3-0 victory in their last encounter in January 2026. They have never recorded two consecutive wins against Sevilla in the top-flight. Sevilla FC have earned points in their last four away LaLiga matches against Levante, and have never done so in five consecutive visits to their ground in the competition's history.

programme.title: Real Oviedo vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Real Oviedo have not won any of their five LaLiga matches against Villarreal, with Villarreal being the opponent against whom the Asturian side have played the most games in the competition without winning any. In all competitions, Villarreal CF have avoided defeat in three of their four away games against Real Oviedo, although they only managed to score in the match they won.

programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.title: Real Madrid vs Deportivo Alaves - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won their last eight matches against Alavés in LaLiga and could equal their best run of consecutive victories against the Vitoria side in the competition's history, achieved between 2002 and 2018. Following their victories in May 2000 and November 2020, Alavés became the first away team to beat Real Madrid at both the Estadio Bernabéu and the Alfredo Di Stéfano in LaLiga. Levante later achieved this feat, winning 0-1 in 2007 and 1-2 in 2018 at Estadio Bernabéu, and 1-2 in 2021 at Alfredo Di Stéfano.

programme.title: Manchester City vs. Arsenal - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Everton vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Burnley vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their 19 Premier League games against Man City. programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.

programme.title: Levante vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Levante UD are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Getafe in LaLiga, keeping a clean sheet in the last four of those ; their best run without conceding at home against a single opponent in their entire top-flight history. Getafe CF are unbeaten in their last four LaLiga games against Levante and have only once gone five consecutive matches without defeat against them in the top-flight, which was in their first five encounters between 2004 and 2007.

programme.title: Elche vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Elche CF have picked up points in three of their last seven LaLiga matches against Valencia, after doing so in just two of their previous 13 top-flight encounters. Valencia CF have won seven of their last nine away LaLiga matches against Elche, after managing just two victories in their first 15 visits to the Franjiverde's home ground in the top-flight.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competition's history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30

programme.title: Nantes vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Nantes have not won any of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Brest, having never gone more than two top-flight games without a win against this opponent before this run. FC Nantes have failed to score in five of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Brest, which is more than in their first 26 encounters. Nantes have lost their last two home Ligue 1 games against Brest, after losing only one of their first 13 such matches.

programme.title: Metz vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Metz have won 68% of their matches against Paris FC in all competitions, their highest ratio against any opponent they have faced at least 15 times. There has never been a draw in seven Ligue 1 meetings between the two teams, with these encounters producing an average of four goals per game. Metz have scored in each of their last 17 matches against Paris FC in all competitions and have not failed to find the net against them since May 1973 in Ligue 1.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1

Atlético de Madrid lost on their last visit to Elche in LaLiga, 1-0 in May 2023, after winning each of their previous five, while the last time they lost two consecutive away games against them in the competition was in September 1975.

programme.title: Limoges vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al-Wakrah vs Al Sadd - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W16
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Sailiya vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Playoffs SF Leg 1 - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
